mapper.select:
select ns.`id`, ns.`networkDelay`, ns.`downloadSpeed`, ns.`uploadSpeed`, ns.`time`, ns.`address`, ns.`macAddress`, ns.`macAddress5G`, ns.`sceneId`, ns.`areaId`, ns.`apId`, ns.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM networkspeed ns LEFT JOIN scene ON ns.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON ns.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap ON ns.`apId`=ap.`id` where 1=1 and ns.`speedometer` like CONCAT('%',#{speedometer},'%') and ns.time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') and ns.time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND ns.`sceneId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sceneId},'%')
AND ns.`areaId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{areaId},'%')
AND ns.`apId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{apId},'%')
ORDER BY ns.`time` DESC

select ns.`id`, ns.`networkDelay`, ns.`downloadSpeed`, ns.`uploadSpeed`, ns.`time`, ns.`address`, ns.`macAddress`, ns.`macAddress5G`, ns.`sceneId`, ns.`areaId`, ns.`apId`, ns.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM networkspeed ns LEFT JOIN scene ON ns.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON ns.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap ON ns.`apId`=ap.`id` where ns.id=#{id}

SELECT * FROM (select time as speedTime,CONCAT(downloadSpeed,'/',uploadSpeed) speedMetric,'上下行' as speedName,'网络测速' as speedType from networkspeed ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 5 ) as netss UNION SELECT * FROM (SELECT time as speedTime,speed as speedMetric,platform as speedName,'体验测速' as speedType FROM experiencespeed ORDER BY time desc LIMIT 5) as exnet
